data.title: STATUS:blocked QUESTIONS JSON displayed raw to user instead of formatted
data.description: When /dso:implementation-plan returns STATUS:blocked with a QUESTIONS JSON array (the output protocol for sprint orchestrator parsing), the sprint orchestrator should parse the JSON and present the questions in a human-readable format (separated by kind: blocking vs defaultable, numbered, with clear text). Instead, the raw STATUS:blocked QUESTIONS:[{...}] line is displayed verbatim to the user as an unformatted JSON blob. The sprint skill (Phase 2 Step 2d-collect) defines the expected presentation format but the orchestrator printed the STATUS line directly instead of parsing it.
